commit.message:
Fix mobile layout: dvh viewport + header wrap regardless of breakpoint

Two root causes of Railway vs local difference:
1. body height:100dvh — mobile browsers include address bar in 100vh,
   pushing the table scrollbar below the visible area. dvh uses the
   actual visible viewport so the scrollbar stays on-screen.
2. header flex-wrap:wrap applied globally (not just ≤640px) — the
   button can overflow on tablets/landscape phones wider than 640px
   where the old breakpoint didn't trigger.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix placement: register pointer events on canvas directly

Register pointerdown/pointerup handlers directly on the canvas element
(same DOM node OrbitControls binds to) instead of the parent container
div. OrbitControls calls setPointerCapture() on pointerdown which can
prevent events from reaching parent elements via normal bubbling.

commit.message:
Fix spin outcome: read from tx receipt instead of contract state

Reading committedSpinOutcome from contract state could return stale
data from a previous block (yesterday's Jackpot instead of today's
RegularSlice) due to RPC caching. The tx receipt is guaranteed to
reflect the exact block the recordSpin tx was mined in.

Add pet companions, mount riding, DK skill VFX, weapon trails, and UI improvements

- Pet companions: Guardian Angel (+HP, damage reduction) and Imp (+attack) with
  floating orbit AI, sparkle VFX, two-pass wing rendering, and body exclusion
- Mount system: Uniria and Dinorant riding with action overrides, root bone
  detection (Rider02 bone 1 = Bip01), animation sync, safe zone auto-dismount,
  and pet/mount mutual exclusion in slot 8
- DK skill VFX: Rageful Blow (radial ground cracks, red light, camera shake),
  Death Stab (forward thrust trail), Twisting Slash (spinning slash ring)
- Weapon blur trail: 30-point tip/base history with level-based color and
  skill-mode white trail, auto-fade on swing end
- Sit/pose system: Interactive world objects (trees, furniture) with walk-to
  interaction and cancel on world click
- Custom cursors: Context-sensitive (attack, talk, pickup) with smooth fade
- Cast bar UI, region name display, and improved notification system
- Music crossfade, new sound effects, quickbar tooltips, ESC key behavior
- Town teleport scroll improvements, shop expansion (Dinorant, DW scrolls)

commit.message:
test: add smoke-user-flow — sign-up → 0 notes → create note/folder → isolation → logout

Covers full new-user journey via API:
  1. Unauthenticated → 401
  2. New user sees 0 notes and 0 folders (data isolation)
  3. Create note → GET returns 1, title + folder correct
  4. Create folder → GET ?folders=1 reflects it
  5. User B sees 0 of User A's data (cross-user isolation)
  6. No token (logged-out) → 401

Run: npm run smoke:flow
All 21 checks pass.

restore the full palette in one call.

Harden sync pipeline: surface all errors, fix silent data loss

Critical fixes based on full sync audit:

1. saveVisitToSupabase now returns {success, error, strippedColumns}
   instead of boolean — callers show toast on ANY failure
2. Stop stripping empty strings — cleared fields now persist correctly
3. fetchVisitsFromSupabase returns {visits, error} — callers show
   toast when cloud sync fails (no more silent offline mode)
4. deleteVisitFromSupabase deletes cloud FIRST, only removes locally
   after cloud confirms — prevents ghost data reappearing
5. Sync button shows accurate messages (not "sync failed" when empty)
6. Mock data only initialized for non-authenticated users
7. Tour regions/submarkets now persisted to localStorage and restored
8. mergeVisits: equal timestamps now prefer LOCAL (user's device is
   source of truth), NaN timestamps handled safely
9. Edit history merged from both sources (was being dropped)
10. All sync errors surface as user-visible toasts with warning icons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix loadFromCache() to return true when any data exists

CRITICAL BUG:
loadFromCache() only returned true if PLACEMENT data existed, ignoring
whether floor plan data was loaded. This caused the app to call
initDefaults() and wipe everything after importing a floor plan.

SCENARIO:
1. User imports floor plan JSON (with furniture catalog)
2. saveToCache() saves floor plan to localStorage
3. User refreshes page
4. loadFromCache() loads floor plan but returns FALSE (no placement yet)
5. app.js sees false, calls initDefaults(), wipes floor plan
6. User sees empty app - all work lost!

FIX:
- Track hasData flag: true if EITHER floor plan OR placement loads
- Return hasData instead of only checking placement
- Move measurements/dividers loading outside placement block
- Call initDefaults() when floor plan exists but no placement (populate staging)

BEHAVIOR NOW:
- Fresh user (no cache): returns false → empty app ✅
- User imports floor plan: returns true → furniture in staging ✅
- User places furniture: returns true → everything persists ✅

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add supplier CSV import with 3-case matching logic

Implements supplier import service that:
- Parses semicolon-delimited CSV files (e.g. FürSie format)
- Matches rows by PZN → EAN → NAN to existing products
- Auto-creates products from ABDA if PZN found in ABDA but not hub
- Creates skeleton products from supplier data when no match
- Links supplier_products with prices and source_data (JSONB)
- Enriches product fields without overwriting existing data
- Adds EANs and HS-codes from supplier data
- Background processing with progress tracking

Frontend: Suppliers page now has tabs (Übersicht + CSV Import)
with drag-drop upload, import log with progress bars, and
matching logic info box.

  job targets only its relevant sports
- Added isSportInSeason() guard: out-of-season sports are automatically
  skipped even if the cron fires
- Updated cron-fetch-all-games.sql with 4 targeted jobs:
    NBA:             daily 7:30am ET + 2pm ET
    NCAAB + NHL:     daily 10am ET
    Soccer/Golf/UFC: Mon + Sat 10am ET
- Removes the old blanket every-4-hours job

Reduces Odds API credit burn from ~500/week to well within 500/month.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add return keyword for early exit in imperative blocks

Add `return` and `return expr` statements for early exit from functions,
actions, reactions, hooks, and lifecycle blocks. Rejected by the checker
in derives, mechanics, conditions, and prompts (expression-oriented blocks
where the modify pipeline depends on last-expression semantics).

Implementation across all pipeline stages:
- Lexer: `return` as reserved keyword
- AST: `StmtKind::Return(Option<Spanned<ExprKind>>)`
- Parser: `parse_return_stmt()` with optional expression
- Checker: validates context via `BlockKind::allows_return()`, type-checks
  return value against enclosing block's return type
- Interpreter: `Env::return_value` flag propagates through eval_block/eval_for,
  cleared at function/action call boundaries
